issues.summary: Implement vector search for code embeddings
issues.description: Add pgvector-based similarity search so /api/ask can retrieve relevant code groups using embedding cosine distance.
Build ingest/adapters/pdf.py using PyMuPDF (fitz) to extract per-page SourceUnits with page-level locators.

issues.summary: Real git history: harvest commits at ingest time
issues.description: After cloning, run git log and store results in repos.recent_commits JSONB so GET /api/git/history returns real data.

issues.summary: Jira import: index issues as SourceUnits
issues.description: Create jira/importer.py to read Jira export JSON and persist each issue as source_type='jira' SourceUnit.

issues.summary: Deep Wiki: replace canned fallback with real LLM call
issues.description: Remove the hardcoded string in _get_deep_wiki_answer and call llm_provider.complete with ANSWER_SCHEMA for honest general-knowledge answers.
